label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which gift after all these swaps. There are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me note down the initial assignments first. Initial gifts: - Alice: green - Bob: white - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow Now, there are several swaps. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Bob and Alice swap. So Alice gives her green to Bob, and Bob gives his white to Alice. After this swap: - Alice: white - Bob: green - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow Second swap: Alice and Eve swap. Alice has white, Eve has yellow. So after swapping: - Alice: yellow - Eve: white - Bob: green - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball Third swap: Claire and Eve swap. Claire has black ball, Eve has white. After swapping: - Claire: white - Eve: black ball - Alice: yellow - Bob: green - Dave: orange ball Fourth swap: Alice and Dave swap. Alice has yellow, Dave has orange. After swapping: - Alice: orange ball - Dave: yellow - Eve: black ball - Claire: white - Bob: green Fifth swap: Bob and Eve swap. Bob has green, Eve has black ball. After swapping: - Bob: black ball - Eve: green - Alice: orange ball - Dave: yellow - Claire: white Wait, so at the end, Eve has the green present? But let me double-check each step to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First swap: A and B. Alice gets white, Bob gets green. Correct. Second swap: A and E. Alice (white) and Eve (yellow) swap. Alice has yellow, Eve has white. Correct. Third swap: C (black) and E (white). So Claire gets white, Eve gets black. Correct. Fourth swap: A (yellow) and D (orange). Alice gets orange, Dave gets yellow. Correct. Fifth swap: B (green) and E (black). Bob gives green to Eve, Eve gives black to Bob. So Eve now has green. So the answer should be (A) green present. Wait, but let me check again. Yes. Let me track Eve's gift through each step: Start: Eve has yellow. After first swap (Bob and Alice): Eve still has yellow. After second swap (Alice and Eve): Eve gets white from Alice. Now Eve has white. After third swap (Claire and Eve): Eve gives white to Claire and gets black ball
